app.title: FR Renamer
app.no_files_desc: Please import files to start batch renaming
app.no_rules: Add a rule to start building your flow
app.select_rule_desc: Choose a renaming rule to add it to your workflow

workflow.quick_guide_desc: Pick a rule first, tune its parameters in the rule card, then verify the result in preview.
workflow.rule_help_no_tokens: This rule does not use template tokens. Configure the fields above to control the naming behavior.

onboarding.entry_description: Use this button anytime to replay the onboarding walkthrough.
onboarding.import_description: Import files first. You can use the button or drag files into the preview area.
onboarding.workflow_description: The left panel is your workflow. Rules run from top to bottom in order.
onboarding.rule_description: Click Add Rule and configure plugins like replace, sequence, or template.
onboarding.reorder_description: You can drag rule cards up or down to change execution order.
onboarding.preview_description: The table shows real-time output names. Check results before running batch rename.
onboarding.run_description: Click here to execute rename. Processed files can be reverted in the table.

replace.name: Find & Replace
replace.description: Find text in file names and replace it (regex supported).

add-prefix-suffix.name: Add Prefix/Suffix
add-prefix-suffix.description: Add text to the beginning or end of file names.

sequence.name: Smart Sequence
sequence.description: Append increasing numbers to file names.

start.label: Start
start.description: Starting number for the first file.

padding.label: Padding
padding.description: Left-pad with zeros to this length.

timestamp.name: Timestamp
timestamp.description: Apply time values to file names.

useCurrentTime.label: Use Current Time
useCurrentTime.description: Use file modified time when disabled.

case-transform.name: Case Transform
case-transform.description: Convert names to different case styles.

clean-name.name: Name Cleanup
clean-name.description: Clean whitespace, illegal characters, and redundant dots.

collapseWhitespace.label: Collapse Spaces
collapseWhitespace.description: Convert consecutive whitespace into a single space.

illegalReplacement.label: Illegal Char Replacement
illegalReplacement.description: Leave empty to remove illegal characters directly.

normalizeDots.label: Normalize Dots
normalizeDots.description: Merge repeated dots and trim dots at both ends.

extension-transform.name: Extension Transform
extension-transform.description: Normalize extension case or set a custom extension.

mode.label: Mode
mode.description: Choose how to handle file extensions.

customExtension.label: Custom Extension
customExtension.description: Only used in "Set Custom Extension" mode, such as jpg or md.

uniqueify.name: Smart Unique
uniqueify.description: Automatically append sequence numbers when names collide.

style.label: Suffix Style
style.description: How duplicate indexes should be displayed.

start.label: Start Number
start.description: First index used when a collision occurs.

padding.label: Zero Padding
padding.description: Set 2 to generate values like 01 and 02.

caseSensitive.label: Case Sensitive
caseSensitive.description: When disabled, File and file are treated as duplicates.

settings.title: Settings
settings.intro: FR Renamer is a file renaming tool built on a plugin architecture, designed by Antigravity.
settings.brand_desc: Keep colors and corner density consistent across the app
settings.stack_desc_typescript: Static typing for plugins and workflow state
settings.stack_desc_vite: Fast dev server and lean production bundles
settings.stack_desc_radix: Accessible dialogs, selects, and interaction primitives
settings.stack_desc_i18n: Bilingual UI copy and runtime locale switch
settings.stack_desc_lucide: Consistent line icons across all controls
settings.stack_desc_vueuse: Utility composables for reactive app behavior

table.batch_tip: Select files to enable batch actions
